text_block_list.text: Haru Urara leaves her mark in the Twinkle Series.

As such, we were able to get through those
crucial first three years together.

One day, while basking in the glory of our
accomplishments...

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Now entering the track is the racer you've all
been waiting for! It's the Umamusume who never
gives up, Haru Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee! Hello, it's me, Haru Urara!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Urara! You're so cute today, just like always!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: We've been waiting for you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! There's so many people! Welcome!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wait, is it weird for me to be the one saying
"welcome"? Well, whatever!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Today is the "Cheer on Haru Urara!" event, after all. That makes me the king!

That's right. Today, Haru Urara makes an
appearance on a talk show sponsored by her fan
club.

Many people are gathered at the small shopping
street to get a glimpse of her. Among them is...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me?! Who's "king," exactly?! The only
person who deserves that title is me!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Aw, let it go. Urara's only king for a day, okay?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hey, Uraraaa! You've got thiiis!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hey, you do it, too!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...U-um... Go, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wowie, wow, wow!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You all came out for me? Thank you!

Her friends from Tracen Academy are here, as
well as...

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Urara! Don't be nervous!

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Just smile and be your energetic self!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the reminder! I'll try my best!

The people from the shopping district, her very
first fans, have closed their stores for today to
come and watch her too.

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
So many people have come to see you, Haru
Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm so grateful they all want to see me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee! They all saw how hard I ran in my races!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Today's such a good day! Seeing everyone smile
makes me so happy!

Haru Urara's smile is like that of a sunny spring
day. Those around her can't help but be drawn in
by it.
And of course, by her can-do attitude, too!

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Well, Haru Urara, let's get started with the first
question: How do you feel about these past three
years?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Um... Hmmm?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I can't really remember anything from that long
ago. Um, uh, well... I ran a lot?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I ran a whole lot! And I also... uh...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hold on a sec!

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text: H-Haru Urara?!

Haru Urara jumps down from the stage! She's
making a beeline for... me?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Trainer, come with me! Let's answer together!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You should be up there too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who watched over me these past
three years, after all!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You saw how much I ran, how hard I tried... You
know everything about me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So, I need you up there with me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: C'mon, take my hand! Let's run up there together!
